chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1747 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A No.7048/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025. Naeem Keerio (Petitioner) present in-person. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional P.G for the State a/w ASI Ghulam Din Memon and ASI Fazad Ali Kaka. ***************************************** Petitioner is present in-person. The Respondent No.1 / SSP Matiari has filed his statement alongwith set of documents including copy of the FIR and challan, which is taken on record. Per documents, the impugned FIR has been challaned which is pending trial before the Court having jurisdiction. The Petitioner present in-person admits that he has been granted pre-arrest bail by the Court of law and he has been appearing before the Court regularly. Learned A.A.G and A.P.G submits that purpose of this Petition in view of dicta laid down in case Director-General, Anti-Corruption Establishment, Lahore and Others v. Muhammad Akram Khan and others (PLD 2013 SC 401), has been served and seeks its disposal. Accordingly, in view of the case law referred above, the Petition is hereby disposed of. However, the Petitioner is directed to continue his presence before the Trial Court. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
